Subject: Request for Extension of Contract-Review Deadline

Dear [Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension of our current contract-review deadline by one week. The additional time would allow us to complete our review thoroughly and ensure that any comments or proposed revisions we share are well-considered and constructive. We very much appreciate the collaborative process to date and want to make sure we do justice to the work already invested by both sides.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether a one-week extension works on your end, and I am happy to discuss an alternative timeframe if that would be more convenient. Thank you in advance for your consideration and flexibility.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
